alerts.alert_title: Immediate Safety Violation at Construction Site
alerts.alert_message: A high-risk safety violation has been detected at a nearby construction site. This poses an immediate danger to residents. Avoid the area and inform the authorities about this violation.
alerts.action: Avoid the area, inform authorities about the safety violation.

alerts.alert_title: High-Risk Construction Site Near Your Area
alerts.alert_message: A construction site has been identified near your area. Please be cautious while passing by and avoid the area if possible. Report any unsafe conditions to local authorities immediately.
alerts.action: Avoid the area if possible, report unsafe conditions to local authorities.
